source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the figure, \( \ln(\rho_i) \) is plotted as a function of \( 1/T \), where \( \rho_i \) is the intrinsic resistivity of silicon, \( T \) is the temperature, and the plot is almost linear. The slope of the line can be used to estimate
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: band gap energy of silicon (\( E_g \))

choice_map.A: band gap energy of silicon (\( E_g \))
choice_map.B: sum of electron and hole mobility in silicon (\( \mu_n + \mu_p \))
choice_map.C: reciprocal of the sum of electron and hole mobility in silicon \((\mu_n + \mu_p)^{-1}\)
choice_map.D: intrinsic carrier concentration of silicon (\( n_i \))
